ideas.name: 智能记账助手
ideas.name_ja: スマート支出トラッカー
ideas.desc: 自动识别消费类型，生成财务报表
ideas.desc_en: Auto-categorize expenses and generate financial reports
ideas.desc_ja: 消費タイプを自動識別し、財務報告書を生成
ideas.desc_ko: 지출 유형 자동 분류 및 재무 보고서 생성
ideas.detail:
实现：OCR识别账单 + AI分类 + 可视化报表
场景：个人理财、家庭预算、企业支出
技术：Python + OCR + NLP + Chart.js
ideas.detail_en:
Approach: OCR receipts + AI categorization + visual reports
Use cases: Personal finance, family budget, business expenses
Tech: Python + OCR + NLP + Chart.js

ideas.name: 投资组合分析器

ideas.desc_en: Analyze portfolio risk/return and suggest optimization

实现：数据抓取 + 风险模型 + 优化算法
场景：股票投资、基金配置、资产管理
技术：Python + Pandas + QuantLib
ideas.detail_en:
Approach: Data scraping + risk model + optimization
Use cases: Stock investment, fund allocation, asset management
Tech: Python + Pandas + QuantLib

ideas.name: 预算提醒机器人
